title: selaginella pallida
intro: Selaginella pallida is a species of spore-producing plant in the genus Selaginella, commonly known as the spikemoss or resurrection plant due to its ability to revive itself after drying out. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Selaginella pallida include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its ability to act as a natural antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
